crowdsourced_yara_results.description: autogenerated rule brought to you by yara-signator
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: DELETED SERVER-OTHER Microsoft Forefront Threat Management Gateway remote code execution attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $EXTERNAL_NET 53 -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"DELETED SERVER-OTHER Microsoft Forefront Threat Management Gateway remote code execution attempt"; flow:to_client; content:"|80|",depth 1,offset 3; content:"|C0 0C 00 05 00 01|"; isdataat:140; byte_test:2,<,2,0,relative; byte_test:2,<,2,2,relative; reference:cve,2011-1889; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:25313; rev:3; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: PROTOCOL-DNS SPOOF query response with TTL of 1 min. and no authority
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $EXTERNAL_NET 53 -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-DNS SPOOF query response with TTL of 1 min. and no authority"; flow:to_client; content:"|81 80|",depth 4,offset 2,fast_pattern; byte_test:2,>,0,0,relative,big; byte_test:2,>,0,2,relative,big; content:"|00 00 00 00|",within 4,distance 4; content:"|C0 0C 00 01 00 01|",distance 0; byte_test:4,<,61,0,relative,big; byte_test:4,>,0,0,relative,big; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,ruleset community; service:dns; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:254; rev:16; )
alert ( gid:119; sid:8; rev: 2; msg:"(http_inspect) multi_slash encoding"; metadata: rule-type preproc; service:http; classtype:not-suspicious;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO HTTP POST Request to Suspicious *.ml Domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO HTTP POST Request to Suspicious *.ml Domain"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.host; content:".ml"; fast_pattern; endswith; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2025102; rev:3; metadata:created_at 2017_12_03, former_category HUNTING, updated_at 2020_09_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO DNS Query for Suspicious .ml Domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO DNS Query for Suspicious .ml Domain"; threshold: type limit, count 1, track by_src, seconds 120; dns.query; content:".ml"; nocase; endswith; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2025106; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2017_12_03, former_category HUNTING, updated_at 2020_09_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO HTTP Request to a *.ml domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO HTTP Request to a *.ml domain"; flow:established,to_server; http.host; content:".ml"; fast_pattern; endswith; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2032988; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_05_18, deployment Perimeter, former_category INFO, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2021_05_18;)

alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE Suspicious .ml dns query"; flow:to_server; byte_test:1,!&,0xF8,2; content:"|02|ml|00|",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,policy security-ips drop; service:dns; reference:url,en.wikipedia.org/wiki/.ml; classtype:misc-activity; sid:39866; rev:4; )
alert ( gid:2; sid:1; rev:1; msg:"TAG_LOG_PKT"; metadata:rule-type preproc; classtype:not-suspicious; )
